Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1000 "ICEHUNTER-0900-1000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0900 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Ice Hunter.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0900 which copies 256 bytes of data from $0910 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400. This allows the game to run correctly.
